fields.analyst_revisions: consensus PT ~$63.73 (range $57-80) — wide dispersion = genuine disagreement on turnaround
fields.news_tone: MIXED / cautiously-optimistic — DUAL activist (Starboard 4/30 letter: cost cuts, 25% EBITDA margin by FY29, ZBB, APAC sale; + Jana stake) with insider buying support, BUT years-of-underperformance backdrop + execution risk
fields.narrative_summary: Dual-activist turnaround (Starboard + Jana) + insider code-P buys = catalyst real; but it's a SHOW-ME story (execution risk, mixed analyst tape). Narrative supports a value-with-catalyst thesis, not a momentum long.
